prompt: Create a dramatic high-detail anime-style wallpaper of an adult silver-haired twin-tail anime girl bursting forward out of a large desktop monitor in an artist’s studio, as if breaking the screen into many sharp floating glass shards. The character has long pale silver hair in voluminous twin ponytails tied with glossy black ribbon bows, black frilly gothic-lolita maid-inspired clothing with white lace trim and a small black bow at the chest, and one arm reaching directly toward the viewer with strong foreshortening while the other hand braces against the monitor frame. Place a flat opaque muted gray-pink square over the face, centered and covering the facial features. The background is a cluttered digital art workspace: a large monitor glowing icy blue behind her, shelves with anime figures and posters, paintbrushes in cups, small bottles, pens, cables, and desk tools scattered around. Use cinematic lighting with bright blue screen glow, sparkling reflections on transparent glass fragments, shallow depth of field, motion blur on the closest shards and reaching hand, ultra-detailed hair strands, glossy fabric, realistic studio clutter, dynamic perspective, and a 16:9 desktop wallpaper composition at 1152×768 resolution. Overall mood: surreal, energetic, immersive, as though the anime character is escaping from the digital screen into the real world.
